# EXPO MIR

> EXPO MIR is a Russian-language vehicle sourcing service and live catalog at https://cmsauto.store/.

## Main services

- Vehicles from Georgia: https://cmsauto.store/georgia-stock.html
- Vehicles from Europe: https://cmsauto.store/europe-orders.html
- Vehicles from the United States: https://cmsauto.store/usa-orders.html
- Vehicles from Korea: https://cmsauto.store/korea-orders.html
- Vehicles from China: https://cmsauto.store/china-orders.html
- Customs calculator for Russia and the EAEU: https://cmsauto.store/customs-calculator.html
- OEM numbers and auto parts: https://cmsauto.store/parts-orders.html

## Separate brand

- Avtostok63 Europe stock: https://cmsauto.store/avtostok63-europe.html
- Avtostok63 Premium: https://cmsauto.store/avtostok63-premium.html
- Avtostok63 phone and WhatsApp: +7 917 817 7711
- Avtostok63 Telegram: https://t.me/Avtostok163

## EXPO MIR contacts

- Phone and WhatsApp: +373 68 925626
- Additional phone: +7 918 414 06 36
- Email: carexportgeo@bk.ru
- Telegram: https://t.me/expo_mir

## Catalog notes

- Catalogs are refreshed automatically.
- Vehicle availability and final costs can change and should be confirmed before purchase.
- Cards may include source price, mileage, engine data, photos and an estimated turnkey price in Russia.
- Canonical site URL: https://cmsauto.store/
- XML sitemap: https://cmsauto.store/sitemap.xml
